_note: Fill all placeholder values before first production session. This config is niche-agnostic — swap values for any app/niche.

account._phaseNote: phase-1 (0-1K): T1+T2+P3. phase-2 (1K-10K): T3+T4+P3. phase-3 (10K+): all tiers.

app.name: YOUR_APP_NAME
app._ctaNote: The keyword used in 'Comment [KEYWORD] for...' CTAs. Keep it short, memorable, and tied to your brand.

brand._note: These values are used by Remotion compositions for consistent visual identity.

fal._note: Monthly budget for fal.ai image/video generation. Fall back to stock/gradients if hit.

remotion._note: Composition IDs must match the Remotion project's registered compositions.

posting._note: Reels are always drafted, never published directly. Human makes the final publish decision.
